gems.title: 奥德赛
gems.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
gems.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,
gems.whyWatch: 史诗级归乡之旅，古典与现代视觉美学的惊艳碰撞。
gems.whyWatchEn: An epic homecoming journey where classical myth meets stunning modern visual storytelling.
gems.audience: 喜爱宏大叙事、神话传说与高水准制作的冒险片爱好者。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of grand narratives, mythology, and high-production adventure films.
